channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Substack introduces a desktop studio for pre-recorded video content

item.title: KSE-100 Closes Lower Amid Volatile Trading and Rising Oil Prices
item.description: Pakistan’s stock market faced another day of volatility on Thursday as the benchmark KSE-100 Index ended lower, shedding 1,437.04 points or 0.92 per cent. The session began with a steep drop of over 1...

item.title: Practical Ways to Stay Safe from Heat Stroke During Hot Weather

item.title: EAC Summit in Arusha: Key Decisions That Could Impact Trade and Investment
item.description: On March 7, 2026, the East African Community (EAC) held its 25th Ordinary Summit in Arusha, Tanzania. The summit produced several important decisions that could affect investors and regional trade. Fi...

item.title: MI5 Contractor on Trial for Allegedly Sharing Secrets Amid Mental Health Decline
item.description: Juan Joseph, a 42-year-old former MI5 contractor from Sutton, South London, is facing trial at the Old Bailey for allegedly passing sensitive information to a foreign state. Joseph worked for MI5 from...

item.title: Advocates urge earlier colorectal cancer screening following patient experiences
item.description: Across Canada, patients and health advocates are calling for the recommended starting age for colorectal cancer screening to be lowered. Highlighting personal stories, such as Canadians diagnosed at a...

item.title: Iran's Supreme Leader Signals Strait of Hormuz Will Remain Closed Amid Rising Oil Prices
item.description: Iran’s newly appointed supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, has declared that the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial global shipping route for oil, will stay closed amid ongoing attacks on oil tankers. This ann...

item.title: African Consumers Shift to Complex and Local Flavours in Food and Drinks
